case_number: Criminal Misc. Application No. S-04 of 2026

chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Misc. Application No. S-04 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 09.01.2026 Ms. Nosheen Pahore advocate for the applicant a/w applicant. Mr. Neel Parkash, DPG a/w SIP PS Tando Adam and ASI of PS Gharibabad. = Heard learned counsel for the applicant and also heard applicant in person. Respondent No.5 Ameer Ali s/o Ali is also present in the Court alongwith minor/ alleged detenue Imran Ali s/o Ameer Ali, aged about eight years. During course of hearing, the minor/ alleged detenue stated that he has been living with his father (respondent No.5). At this stage, the applicant states that meetings of the minor/ alleged detenue are not being allowed by the respondent No.5. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant may avail her remedies before the appropriate forum, strictly in accordance with law. The instant Criminal Miscellaneous application is disposed of in above terms. JUDGE “Saleem” 2
